title: BBchess
text: Home * Engines * BBchess BBchess , a chess program by Bernard Brioit . The engine part was written in Pascal , its own GUI written in Delphi . BBchess uses the 0x88 Board representation and performs an improved MTD(f) search on top of iterative deepening and applies Null move pruning with a depth reduction of 3 [1] . It uses two transposition tables , and supports the Thompson endgame databases with three and four pieces [2] . Contents 1 Tournament Play 2 Namesake 3 See also 4 Forum Posts 5 References Tournament Play [ edit ] BBchess played all French Computer Chess Championships from FCCC 1996 until its last occurence at the FCCC 2004 , as well the French Programmers Tournaments from Massy 2001 until Massy 2006 .
